rationale: Section 31.036 establishes a fixed-dollar tax credit program for teaching services in lieu of school taxes on homesteads. Credit amounts ($500/$1,000) are not tied to the homestead exemption amount, so raising the §11.13(b) exemption does not require amending this section.
quote: A qualified individual who teaches a course for an entire school semester is entitled to a maximum credit of $500 against the taxes imposed
_note: No cross-reference to §11.13(b) or exemption dollar amounts exists in §31.036. The credit is a fixed dollar amount against taxes imposed, not a percentage or function of appraised value.
